variables.name: spf_value
variables.description: SPF TXT record value from Mailgun (e.g. v=spf1 include:mailgun.org ~all)

variables.name: dkim_selector
variables.description: DKIM selector prefix (the part before ._domainkey in the record name)

variables.name: dkim_value
variables.description: DKIM CNAME target value from Mailgun

variables.name: mx_value
variables.description: MX record hostname from Mailgun (e.g. mxa.mailgun.org)
